signals.text: Two back-to-back calls completed Apr 7 and Apr 8 — brand re-engaged after 27-day silence since Mar 11
Supreme Creme relaunch set for Apr 22 — brand wants FERMÀT alternative landing pages for A/B testing against paid social
Ryan Ruger (Sr. Mgr Paid Social) shared New Supreme Creme assets and product docs on Apr 10 — creative pipeline unblocked
New stakeholder Deepa (configuration specialist from Guthy-Renker) onboarded to platform on Apr 8 call — expanding brand-side capabilities
Zero FERMÀT sessions/revenue across entire 45-day window — platform completely inactive, no funnels have ever gone live
No upcoming calls scheduled after Apr 8 — need to book next check-in before Apr 22 launch deadline
Slack channel dead since Feb 24 — brand does not use Slack internally (explicitly stated by Jessica Tennant); all communication is email-only

performance.note: FERMÀT API returned no funnel metrics for org 508e7756-81aa-48b1-bbf5-765d2e8f1eb9 between 2026-02-26 and 2026-04-12. Brand has never gone live on FERMÀT funnels — zero sessions, zero revenue across all periods. Supreme Creme launch target is Apr 22.

recent.title: Westmore Beauty x FERMÀT (Supreme Creme Check-In)
recent.participants: Pulkit Srivastava (FERMÀT), Ryan Ruger (Westmore), Brenda Hernandez (Westmore), Deepa (Guthy-Renker)
recent.summary: Supreme Creme relaunch check-in. Product launches Apr 22 with complete packaging redesign — repositioned from body/face to face-focused. Ryan Ruger shared existing paid social landing page. Brand wants FERMÀT alternative landing pages for A/B testing. Pulkit committed to deliver V1 funnel draft and updated PDP by Apr 8 afternoon. Deepa (configuration specialist) introduced. Shopify integration confirmed one-way. Brenda confirmed they have not tested anything built by FERMÀT yet — everything was on hold for months.

Propose landing page strategy (bundles, messaging, angle) in follow-up email
Deliver V1 funnel draft by Apr 8 afternoon
Update PDP with new assets and have ready for review by Apr 8 afternoon

Add Deepa to the FERMÀT platform

recent.title: Jessica Tennant Call (Granola)
recent.summary: Addressed funnel pricing issues (Body Coverage Perfector showing $99 instead of $59.40 for 7oz variant). Multiple translation issues between team and client. Two funnels need immediate fixes to go live. Rebrand launching soon may require redoing all work. Reviews need updating to 'Over 7,000+ 5-star reviews'. Free eyeliner offer only with $50+ orders.
action_items: Fix Body Coverage Perfector pricing to $59.40 for 7oz variant
Set free eyeliner offer threshold to $50+

calls.analysis: Strong re-engagement cadence: after 27 days of silence (Mar 11 to Apr 7), brand completed two back-to-back calls on Apr 7 (Supreme Creme check-in with Ryan/Brenda/Deepa) and Apr 8 (dedicated Deepa onboarding). Total of 5 recorded Westmore calls across Glyphic and Granola. Key inflection: Brenda proactively booked the Apr 7 call on Apr 2 — brand is now driving engagement rather than being chased. Ryan Ruger shared assets on Apr 10. Supreme Creme launch deadline is Apr 22 (9 days away). Critical risk: no follow-up call scheduled after Apr 8 with 9 days to launch.

Integrations complete (Google Ads, GA, Klaviyo). Action items for Westmore: share brand kit, upload hero video. Action items for FERMÀT: resend Slack invite, scrape additional assets, revise 60 Second Eye funnel.
Westmorebeauty has removed themselves from this channel.
Can you please add us as members from the admin? We don't use Slack internally and are having issues accessing Slack past a free trial period.
Confirming I've reshared access to them!
Pre-call setup instructions with integration guides (Shopify, GA4, Meta) and onboarding checklist.

slack.analysis: Slack channel is effectively dead and has been since Feb 24. Westmore Beauty does not use Slack internally — Jessica Tennant explicitly stated this on Feb 10, and the brand org removed itself from the channel twice (Feb 5, Feb 12). Last substantive message was Talia's recap on Feb 14. Zero messages from Pulkit or the brand in 48+ days. All real communication happens over email. This channel should not be weighted heavily for health scoring — it is a known communication preference, not disengagement.

email.analysis: Email is the primary and effectively ONLY communication channel for Westmore Beauty. Strong positive momentum in the last week: Ryan Ruger shared Supreme Creme assets on Apr 10 (unblocking funnel creation), followed up twice the same day. Pulkit sent a follow-up nudge on Apr 9 and a Superhuman reminder triggered Apr 10. The recap thread has been continuous since the Feb 13 kick-off. Meta for Business confirmed ads were approved on Apr 10 — suggesting active ad campaign setup. Key contacts: Brenda Hernandez (Director of Ecommerce), Ryan Ruger (Senior Manager, Paid Social), Deepalakshmi Murugesan (Configuration Specialist, Guthy-Renker), Jessica Tennant (Head of Ecommerce & Performance Marketing — less active recently). Contract renewal due May 2026 (joined February).
